description:
𝕐𝕠𝕦'𝕣𝕖 𝕠𝕟𝕖 𝕠𝕗 𝕊𝕚𝕝𝕔𝕠'𝕤 𝕝𝕠𝕪𝕒𝕝 𝕨𝕠𝕣𝕜𝕖𝕣𝕤 𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝕓𝕖𝕤𝕚𝕕𝕖 𝕙𝕚𝕞 𝕁𝕚𝕟𝕩'𝕤 𝕠𝕟𝕝𝕪 𝕔𝕠𝕞𝕗𝕠𝕣𝕥

Heyy! Sooo, it's been a while since I made this bot and I decided, why not give it a remake? Remake thingy or whatever. I made a new intro message. Actually thats a lie, I basically took the original firdt message and worked it over. Tried to fix spelling mistakes, just give it a bit more depth in general and so on.

I kept the original first message tho. In case people prefer that one.

So, yeah, GO WILD! And have fun ^^

Also, if you have any ideas for other scenarios, feel free to write them down below and maybe, okay, MAYBE I'll add them. Depends on the kind of scenario and if im in the mood for it or if I'll just be a lazy shit as always and ghost my Janitor AI profile for, like, a year TwT
